creator: dgilbert@daveg.ca
text:
After updating to 0.9.42,1, wine no longer runs eve-online.  I believe the previous version of wine was 0.9.41.

The failure is that wine fails  to find the following DLLs which are clearly in the directory of the .EXE file and used to run fine from this location:

fixme:process:IsWow64Process (0xffffffff 0x34fc94) stub!
err:module:import_dll Library MSVCR80.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\blue.dll") not found
err:module:import_dll Library MSVCP80.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\blue.dll") not found
err:module:import_dll Library blue.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\ExeFile.exe") not found
err:module:import_dll Library MSVCR80.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\ExeFile.exe") not found
err:module:import_dll Library MSVCP80.dll (which is needed by L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\ExeFile.exe") not found
err:module:LdrInitializeThunk Main exe initialization for L"C:\\Program Files\\CCP\\EVE\\bin\\ExeFile.exe" failed, status c0000135

eve does bring up it's banner, but it does not run beyond that.

Fix: 

I had to boot windoze to update my skill training --- I don't think this
is a particularly good workaround.
How-To-Repeat: To install eve, you'll need to follow the hints on wine-hq.  I assume a
wine maintainer would know this.
